invariant_library.proofless_settlement: Value release requires explicit validated proof and authority checks.
invariant_library.instant_upgrade: Upgrade authority requires delay/timelock and visible governance intent.

invariant_library.no_challenge_window: Post-approval settlement requires challenge window expiry.
